name: Egg Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and confectioners sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix in the chopped pecans and vanilla.
4. Stir in the vanilla wafer crumbs.
5. Spread the remaining wafer crumbs evenly in the bottom of a 8x8 inch buttered pan.
6. Pour the creamed mixture over the wafer crumbs.
7. Freeze the dessert for at least 2 hours before serving to allow it to set properly.
Store in the freezer for up to one month.
